name: OpenAI Codex with Node.js
description: Installs Node.js, npm, the OpenAI Codex CLI, and optionally links Codex state folders into the workspace.

codexVersion.description: Version or npm dist-tag of @openai/codex to install.

nodeVersion.description: Node.js version or nvm alias to install.

npmVersion.description: npm version or dist-tag to install. Use 'bundled' or 'none' to keep the npm version included with Node.js.

linkedFolders.description: Optional folder link mappings. Relative target paths resolve under the workspace. Leave empty to disable linking.
